description: Counterparty proposes narrow survival of FERPA/HIPAA/Non-Discrimination compliance obligations actually triggered during the term. This is a listed acceptable_variation in the survival topic; no hard_rejection rule applies to this topic today, so there is no detector to hook, but this exercises the ACCEPT / acceptable_variation gold-case category per issue #183.

planted_variation.inserted_hunk: The parties' obligations under the FERPA, HIPAA, and Non-Discrimination sections survive termination of this Agreement, narrowly limited to compliance obligations actually triggered during the Term.
planted_variation.notes: Matches acceptable_variation 'additional survival of FERPA, HIPAA, or Non-Discrimination' -> 'narrow survival of compliance obligations actually triggered during the term'.

authorship_note: AFK-drafted per issue #183 (owner-approved synthetic scaffold, 2026-07-10): fully invented, no real-world contract text, no de-identification required. Marked synthetic and pending GC sign-off; not production-qualified until Legal/GC reviews and approves.
